title: Savory Sharp British Sauerkraut Pasties
description: A savory, cheese-pull, quick-fix British dish featuring sauerkraut, perfect for a satisfying snack or light meal. This ovo-vegetarian-friendly recipe is a twist on traditional Cornish pasties.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sauerkraut, onion, potato, and cheddar cheese.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the sauerkraut mixture onto one half of each pastry circle.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg.
Fold the other half of the pastry circle over the filling to form a half-moon shape, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the pasties with the olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Place the pasties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
